description: Correct linear search written in OCR ERL pseudocode — expect full marks.

part.prompt: Write an algorithm in OCR Exam Reference Language that performs a linear search for `target` in `items`. Return the index of the first occurrence, or -1 if not found.
part.raw_answer:
function linear_search(items, target)
  for i = 0 to items.length - 1
    if items[i] == target then
      return i
    endif
  next i
  return -1
endfunction

markPoints.text: Loop across every element in the array
Return the index when a match is found
Return -1 (or suitable sentinel) when no match is found

questionStem: A function searches an unsorted array for a target value.
modelAnswer:
function linear_search(items, target)
  for i = 0 to items.length - 1
    if items[i] == target then
      return i
    endif
  next i
  return -1
endfunction
